app.title: Report Platform
app.noTemplatesAvailable: No report templates available. Please seed the database.
app.reportsDescription: List of all generated reports, updated automatically.

about.title: About
about.description: This is a platform for generating and managing reports. The system allows creating, viewing, and exporting reports in various formats.
about.feature1: Report generation in PDF and Excel formats
about.feature3: Pagination and filtering of report list
about.techStack: Frontend: React, TypeScript, Material-UI, React Router. Backend: Node.js, Express, Prisma, PostgreSQL.
about.architectureDescription: Below is a UML diagram illustrating the platform architecture:
about.architectureCaption: UML diagram of the report platform architecture
